structure._description: Référentiel des principaux angles astrologiques du thème natal.

data.description: Eastern horizon point at the moment of birth representing embodiment, appearance, instinctive behavior, and the beginning of the first house.
Western horizon point opposite the Ascendant representing relationships, projection, encounters, partnership, and the beginning of the seventh house.
Upper meridian point representing vocation, career direction, public image, visibility, status, and social achievement.
Lower meridian point representing roots, ancestry, emotional foundation, private life, home, and the beginning of the fourth house.
